---
name: Epic
about: Groom a significant outcome before implementation begins
labels: epic
---

## Problem statement

What problem are we solving? For whom?

## Why now

What makes this worth prioritising over other work?

## Success criteria

What does done look like? How will we know it worked?

## Constraints

What must not change? What are we explicitly not solving?

## Open questions

What needs to be resolved before implementation can begin?

## Out of scope

List what is explicitly excluded from this epic.
